---
title: "Research Group"
---

<div id="team-network-wrap">
<div id="team-network"></div>
<div class="team-timeline"><input type="range" id="team-year-slider" class="team-slider" min="2016" max="2026" value="2026" step="1"><span id="team-year-display" class="team-year-display">2026</span></div>
<div id="team-tooltip" class="team-tooltip">
<div class="tt-name"></div>
<div class="tt-role"></div>
<div class="tt-topic"></div>
<div class="tt-now"></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="team-text-content">

## Current Members

### Postdoctoral Researchers

**Dr Thejas Chakrapani** (2024-)
Spectral heat flows at solid-liquid interfaces

### PhD Students

**Zhaolun Li** (2025-)
Machine learning potentials for solid-liquid interfaces

**Pengxu Chen** (2022-)
Using nanoscale vibrations to reduce surface icing

---

## Past Supervision

### Postdoctoral Researchers

**Dr Saikat Datta** (2018-2024)
Acoustothermal nanobubbles
*Leverhulme Trust Early Career Fellow → [Senior Lecturer, Swansea University](https://www.swansea.ac.uk/staff/saikat.datta/)*

**Dr Sree Hari Perumanath** (2020-2021)
Multiscale fluid dynamics
*Leverhulme Trust Early Career Fellow → [Assistant Professor, IIT Madras](https://mech.iitm.ac.in/profile.php?fname=sreehari)*

### PhD Students

**Abdullah El-Rifai** (2020-2024)
Thermal resistance at liquid-solid interfaces
*Left for: Renewables Consultant, Wood PLC*


**Patrick Sullivan** (2019-2023)
Formation and growth of vapour bubbles
*Left for: PDRA, Durham University*

**Vasileios-Martin Nikiforidis** (2017-2021)
Ice growth on surfaces
*Left for: Postdoc, University of Cyprus*

**Sritay Mistry** (2018-2022)
Flows through nanomaterials
*Left for: PDRA, Brunel University*

**Sree Hari Perumanath** (2016-2019)
Merging and jumping nanodroplets
*Left for: PDRA, University of Edinburgh*

</div>

---

## Join Us

I am always looking for motivated PhD students and postdocs interested in molecular simulations, multiscale modelling, and interfacial physics.

Contact me at [R.Pillai AT ed.ac.uk](mailto:R.Pillai@ed.ac.uk) to discuss opportunities.
